summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Charge Stand is not properly displayed in "Software" tab if it is currently unplugged
scenario: Charge Stand name and image are not properly displayed in Device Settings > Software tab when unplugged from power
description_clean: When a Charge Stand is unplugged from power, it is not properly displayed in the Device Settings > Software tab. The name changes to match the headset name and the image is replaced with a placeholder. After plugging the Charge Stand back in, the page refreshes and shows the correct information. Expected: Charge Stand should be properly displayed in Device Settings > Software even when unplugged.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Charge Stand is connected to the headset.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Tap on the Software tab in Device Settings.
5. Observe that the Charge Stand is displayed with its correct name and image.
6. Unplug the Charge Stand from power.
7. Return to Device Settings > Software tab.
expected: Charge Stand should be properly displayed in Device Settings > Software tab with its correct name and image, even when unplugged from power.
actual: After unplugging the Charge Stand from power, the name changes to match the headset name and the image is replaced with a placeholder. After plugging the Charge Stand back in, the page refreshes and shows the correct information.
